import sys
from bisect import bisect_right
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n, m, k = map(int, input().split())
    xs = list(map(int, input().split()))
    ys = list(map(int, input().split()))
    xs_set = set(xs)
    ys_set = set(ys)
    
    from collections import defaultdict
    # vertical-only persons: x in xs, y not in ys
    # group by y-gap
    vert = defaultdict(lambda: defaultdict(int))  # gap -> x -> count
    horiz = defaultdict(lambda: defaultdict(int))  # gap -> y -> count
    
    for _ in range(k):
        xp, yp = map(int, input().split())
        on_v = xp in xs_set
        on_h = yp in ys_set
        if on_v and not on_h:
            gap = bisect_right(ys, yp) - 1
            vert[gap][xp] += 1
        elif on_h and not on_v:
            gap = bisect_right(xs, xp) - 1
            horiz[gap][yp] += 1
    
    ans = 0
    for gap, xmap in vert.items():
        total = sum(xmap.values())
        ans += total*(total-1)//2 - sum(c*(c-1)//2 for c in xmap.values())
    for gap, ymap in horiz.items():
        total = sum(ymap.values())
        ans += total*(total-1)//2 - sum(c*(c-1)//2 for c in ymap.values())
    
    print(ans)

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()
